message:
feat(lab,bin,ci): structured oracle tracing, differential profile contracts, and fast CI differential lane

src/lab/oracle/mod.rs:
- Add structured tracing::info event emission on every oracle check
  with fields: event=oracle_check, invariant, passed, entities_tracked,
  events_recorded, details (violation text or 'clean')
- Add EventRecorder test layer with tracing_subscriber to capture and
  assert on emitted oracle_check events
- Add oracle_report_emits_structured_oracle_check_events test

src/lab/oracle/fabric.rs:
- Add EventRecorder test infrastructure (same pattern as oracle/mod.rs)
- Add assertion that fabric_publish oracle_check tracing events are
  emitted with correct invariant, passed, and detail fields
- Expand existing fabric oracle test to validate structured tracing

src/bin/asupersync.rs:
- Add LabDifferentialProfileContract struct for structured profile-level
  evidence grading (evidence_grade, confidence_label, runtime_cost,
  operator_intent, exit_semantics, scenario_ids)
- Add LAB_DIFFERENTIAL_ARTIFACT_INDEX_SCHEMA_VERSION constant
- Add profile contract generation in the differential runner
- Add scenario inventory grouping by evidence profile
- Expand artifact bundle with profile contracts and index schema

.github/ci_matrix_policy.json:
- Add lab-live-differential-fast lane policy with required job/step/
  artifact names and evidence grade requirements

.github/workflows/ci.yml:
- Add differential-fast job: runs the lab-live differential fast gate
  with --profile fast-ci, uploads summary artifacts, and validates
  exit semantics

scripts/run_lab_live_differential.sh:
- Add RCH_BIN fallback: try rch if available, otherwise fall back to
  direct cargo run, enabling CI environments without rch installed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -63,6 +63,30 @@
         "required_artifacts_min": 0
       }
     },
+    {
+      "lane_id": "lab-live-differential-fast",
+      "title": "Fast lab-vs-live differential CI lane",
+      "owner": "verification-infra",
+      "required_job_ids": ["differential-fast"],
+      "required_step_names": [
+        "Differential fast CI gate"
+      ],
+      "required_artifact_names": [
+        "lab-live-differential-fast-artifacts"
+      ],
+      "replay_command": "bash scripts/run_lab_live_differential.sh --profile smoke --seed 91 --out-dir artifacts/lab-differential-fast && bash scripts/run_lab_live_differential.sh --profile calibration --scenario calibration.channel.commit_visibility_mismatch --seed 20260323 --out-dir artifacts/lab-differential-fast",
+      "require_rch": false,
+      "rch_required_step_names": [],
+      "failure_taxonomy": [
+        "profile_contract_regression",
+        "artifact_bundle_contract_regression",
+        "calibration_path_regression"
+      ],
+      "thresholds": {
+        "max_failures": 0,
+        "required_artifacts_min": 1
+      }
+    },
     {
       "lane_id": "e2e",
       "title": "Deterministic E2E scenario matrix lane",

@@ -598,6 +598,90 @@ jobs:
             cargo check --all-targets --all-features
           fi
 
+  differential-fast:
+    name: Differential Fast Gate
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install Rust toolchain
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
+        with:
+          toolchain: ${{ env.RUST_TOOLCHAIN }}
+
+      - name: Cache cargo registry
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: |
+            ~/.cargo/registry
+            ~/.cargo/git
+            target
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-differential-fast-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
+
+      - name: Differential fast CI gate
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          mkdir -p artifacts/lab-differential-fast
+
+          bash scripts/run_lab_live_differential.sh \
+            --profile smoke \
+            --seed 91 \
+            --out-dir artifacts/lab-differential-fast \
+            | tee artifacts/lab-differential-fast/smoke.stdout.log
+
+          bash scripts/run_lab_live_differential.sh \
+            --profile calibration \
+            --scenario calibration.channel.commit_visibility_mismatch \
+            --seed 20260323 \
+            --out-dir artifacts/lab-differential-fast \
+            | tee artifacts/lab-differential-fast/calibration.stdout.log
+
+      - name: Summarize differential fast gate
+        if: always()
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          {
+            echo "## Lab Differential Fast Gate"
+            echo
+            for profile in smoke calibration; do
+              profile_dir="artifacts/lab-differential-fast/${profile}"
+              artifact_index="${profile_dir}/artifact_index.json"
+              operator_summary="${profile_dir}/operator_summary.txt"
+              echo "### ${profile}"
+              if [[ -f "${artifact_index}" ]]; then
+                scenario_ids="$(jq -r '[(.scenarios // [])[] | .scenario_id] | join(", ")' "${artifact_index}" 2>/dev/null || echo "<unavailable>")"
+                exit_semantics="$(jq -r '.exit_semantics // "<missing>"' "${artifact_index}" 2>/dev/null || echo "<unavailable>")"
+                aggregate_event_log="$(jq -r '.aggregate_event_log_path // "<missing>"' "${artifact_index}" 2>/dev/null || echo "<unavailable>")"
+                if [[ -z "${scenario_ids}" ]]; then
+                  scenario_ids="<none>"
+                fi
+                echo "- artifact_index: \`${artifact_index}\`"
+                echo "- scenario_ids: \`${scenario_ids}\`"
+                echo "- exit_semantics: \`${exit_semantics}\`"
+                echo "- aggregate_event_log: \`${aggregate_event_log}\`"
+              else
+                echo "- artifact_index missing: \`${artifact_index}\`"
+              fi
+              if [[ -f "${operator_summary}" ]]; then
+                echo
+                echo '```text'
+                cat "${operator_summary}"
+                echo '```'
+              fi
+              echo
+            done
+          } >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
+
+      - name: Upload differential fast gate artifacts
+        if: always()
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: lab-live-differential-fast-artifacts
+          path: artifacts/lab-differential-fast/
+          retention-days: 14
+
   lean-smoke:
     name: Lean Smoke Gate (PR)
     if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'

@@ -3,10 +3,15 @@ set -euo pipefail
 
 ROOT_DIR="$(cd -- "$(dirname -- "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"
 LOCAL_BIN="${ROOT_DIR}/target/debug/asupersync"
+RCH_BIN="${RCH_BIN:-$HOME/.local/bin/rch}"
 
 if [[ -x "${LOCAL_BIN}" ]]; then
   exec "${LOCAL_BIN}" lab differential "$@"
 fi
 
 cd "${ROOT_DIR}"
-exec rch exec -- cargo run --features cli --bin asupersync -- lab differential "$@"
+if [[ -x "${RCH_BIN}" ]]; then
+  exec "${RCH_BIN}" exec -- cargo run --features cli --bin asupersync -- lab differential "$@"
+fi
+
+exec cargo run --features cli --bin asupersync -- lab differential "$@"
